title: HistoryViewer, HumanReadableHistoryViewerPrinter, JSONHistoryViewerPrinter
description:
HistoryViewer is used to parse and view the JobHistory files. It can print the job/task/attempt summary information in human-readable format or machine-readable JSON format.

HumanReadableHistoryViewerPrinter provides a way to print a human-readable summary of a job's history.

JSONHistoryViewerPrinter is used to print the job/task/attempt summary information in machine-readable JSON format.
